---
title: "Ormary Alvarez receives a PLANTS fellowship"
description: "Ormary Alvarez presented her latest results on Wollemia ovule development at BOTANY 2025."
date: 2025-07-30
toc: true
---

From July 26–30, 2025, Ormary Alvarez — a SCINet intern and undergraduate student at Lehman College — received a PLANTS fellowship to attend BOTANY 2025 in Palm Springs, California. There, she presented a poster sharing her most recent results on Wollemia ovule development. This experience was a wonderful opportunity for Ormary to share her work with the broader botanical community and connect with researchers from across the field.

![][Ormary Alvarez presenting her poster at BOTANY 2025](iimages/jan17.jpeg){width="300px" fig-align="center"}fig-cap="Ormary Alvarez presenting her poster on Wollemia ovule development at BOTANY 2025."}
